features: Instantly conceals with a unique micro-encapsulated technology
Gently treats redness with 5 active ingredients
description: Product Description Rosalique 3 in 1 Anti-Redness Miracle Formula SPF50 Suitable for All Skin Types When purchasing from Amazon, please select 'Rosalique' to ensure you receive the newest stock with the quality you expect from us. All other sellers are unofficial and may sell old stock, of which we cannot determine the quality. Developed especially for hypersensitive and redness-prone skin. Rosalique provides an instant concealing effect through its unique microencapsulated technology and offers redness-reducing ingredients α-Bisabolol, Zeolite, Provitamin B5, Urea and Shea Butter. Your skin stays protected long-term from UVA/UVB rays with a 5* rated SPF. A targeted formula for skin prone to rosacea, couperose, keratosis pilaris, ageing and uneven skin tone. Rosalique 3 in 1 Anti-Redness Miracle Formula SPF50 is vegan, cruelty-free, non-comedogenic, dermatologically tested and aesthetically graded. Rosalique works perfectly as a tinted moisturiser, colour-correcting concealer or as a primer under makeup. Recommended Use Apply in the morning to clean skin, either in place of or after your moisturiser. Using your fingers or a brush, apply a small amount evenly across your face and blend until it blends seamlessly with your complexion. Buildable for higher coverage. Reapply throughout the day if required. Use daily for 6-8 weeks to experience the full results. The Results Instantly conceal redness with its unique microencapsulated technology Gently reduce symptoms with 5 active ingredients Protect skin from UVA & UVB rays with an SPF50 Maximum results in just 8 weeks The Triple Action Effect Instant Concealing Effect The unique micro-encapsulated pigments in Rosalique deliver ultra-fine colour pigments directly to the skin, masking any redness or unevenness instantly. The green outer layer of the micro balls further neutralises skin redness. Gentle Treatment Effect Containing active ingredients like Zeolite, Alpha-Bisabolol, Panthenol, Shea Butter & Urea gently treat all symptoms associated with Redness. Skin redness is reduced, controlled and managed long term. Long Term Protection Effect UV filters offer protection from UVA and UVB rays that aggravate red skin. The SPF 50 offers protection from further long-term skin damage. Real People, Real Results Before After Before After Real People, Real Results Before After Before After Why is Rosalique 3 in 1 Miracle Formula green? When you first use Rosalique, do not be surprised when you find it being minty, bright, green! Firstly, we use a unique micro-encapsulated technology. The green coloured micro balls contain skin colouring pigments which, when applied to the skin, break to allow for an instant concealing effect. The skin will instantly look more even-toned, less agitated and any signs of redness is reduced. Additionally, the green colour forming the outer layer of the balls further neutralise skin redness, as green is the ideal neutraliser to the colour red. What are the active ingredients in Rosalique 3 in 1 Miracle Formula? The active ingredients used in Rosalique have a clinically proven ability to successfully treat sensitive red skin. The long-term therapeutic effect of using Rosalique on a daily basis indicate that over a period of 4 to 8 weeks redness is significantly reduced. Primary Active A-Bisabolol (clinically proven anti-inflammatory) Supporting Actives Zeolite, Urea, Shea Butter, Panthenol (pro-vitamin B5) What is Rosalique 3 in 1 Anti-Redness Miracle Formula SPF50? This is really the million dollar question! When developing Rosalique we tried to create a product that was so incredibly versatile that it would suit nearly everyone. Rosalique has 3 key functions - it is green coloured light consistency which blends in with the skin when massaging it into the skin, it has 5 key active ingredients to soothe, calm and moisturise the skin, and it has an SPF50. This means that Rosalique is basically all of the above! Some of our customers use Rosalique as a tinted moisturiser, some use it as a primer, some as their foundation or concealer, it is all possible! Rosalique aims to be the #1 face cream for skin sensitivity and erythema (red skin). The unique bio-scientific formula is formulated to be the fastest, safest and most effective solution for facial redness. Does Rosalique 3 in 1 Miracle Formula conceal or treat redness? Rosalique has been designed to do both! The unique green cream instantly conceals any redness or uneven marks you may have. On top of that we have included 5 active power ingredients to ensure your skin gets calmed, soothed and hydrated whilst you are wearing Rosalique. And lastly, Rosalique has a third benefit - an SPF of 50! All three key functions combined means the best results for a healthy skin long-term.
